name: Citizens Community Bancorp Inc.
summary: Citizens Community Bancorp, Inc. is a Maryland bank holding company organized in 2004, operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary Citizens Community Federal N.A., a federally chartered National Bank. The Bank serves customers in Wisconsin and Minnesota through 21 full-service branch locations, offering commercial real estate loans, C&I loans, agricultural loans, residential mortgages, home equity lines-of-credit, consumer loans, and a broad range of deposit products including demand deposits, savings accounts, money-market accounts, and certificates of deposit.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial real estate properties for business borrowers.

products.name: Commercial and Industrial (C&I) Loans
products.description: Commercial lending products for business operations and industrial purposes.

products.name: Agricultural Real Estate Loans
products.description: Real estate loans tailored for agricultural operators and farmland.

products.name: Agricultural Operating Loans
products.description: Operating credit facilities for agricultural businesses and farmers.

products.name: Residential Mortgages
products.description: One-to-four family residential mortgage loans for consumers.

products.name: Home Equity Lines-of-Credit
products.description: Revolving credit lines secured by residential home equity.

products.name: Consumer Installment Loans
products.description: Consumer lending products for individual borrowers.

products.name: Demand Deposits
products.description: Non-interest and interest-bearing demand deposit accounts for customers.

products.name: Savings and Money-Market Accounts
products.description: Interest-bearing savings and money-market deposit products.

products.name: Certificates of Deposit
products.description: Time deposit products offering fixed interest rates for set terms.

products.name: Remote Deposit Capture
products.description: Electronic deposit service for commercial customers not near branch locations.

products.name: Mobile Banking
products.description: Mobile banking platform for retail customers as an alternative delivery system.

products.name: Investment Securities Portfolio
products.description: Portfolio of mortgage-backed, asset-backed, U.S. agency, and corporate debt securities.

partnerships.description: Member of FHLB System; uses FHLB borrowings as a source of funds.
Member of Federal Reserve System; maintains lines of credit with Federal Reserve Bank.
Deposit accounts insured by FDIC Deposit Insurance Fund to statutory limits.
